title: 目標達成の後に・クラシックへ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, the long-awaited results, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What else could it be? Increasing my fandom, of
course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A lack of notoriety would diminish the
significance of racing in the Classic Triple Crown,
after all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isn't that correct, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, yes... Not that I could ever race in the
Classic Triple Crown myself...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But fans are really important. I know that for
sure...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I have instructed my fans to gather at the
gymnasium.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If my efforts have succeeded, a standing ovation
from a full house of my adoring fans awaits!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I've failed, the crickets will chirp! It won't be
much different from the party at the end of last
year, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, who will show their face? A benevolent
angel or a cackling demon? Will the gymnasium
be full of adoring fans or completely empty?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The moment of truth has come. Open!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That's Opera O! Hey, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The number of fans are... decent. Same goes for
the applause.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my! The venue is alive with the sound of
applause!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It would not be an exaggeration to say I have
charmed the people of the world, would it,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her exaggerations, it isn't a stretch to say
she'll be gaining even more fans in the first race
of the the Classic Triple Crown, the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, now that the Satsuki Sho is firmly in my
sights...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Welcome my fans, one and all! Lend me your ears!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O begins to give a speech.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The curtain to glory has been raised! My mission
is simple, to defeat the older generation and pass
the torch to mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, to do so, I must make my presence felt
in the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It will be a long and arduous journey. A great and
powerful foe will likely attempt to bar my path.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I shall not lose! The Overlord will boldly fight
this adversary and claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: But... who's the adversary?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Who? Who is it, Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My foe is no other than...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer? Go ahead, tell them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the crowd in the palm of her hand, but
with full confidence passes their attention to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's too early to know who'll be favored in the
Classics. The first name that comes to mind is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: M-me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The Classics? On, no, no... I'd never qualify. At
least... I don't think so!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, now is not the time to dawdle. Visualize the
future—ignore the reality!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Step forward and see how gloriously your
unexpected presence resounds throughout this
venue.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My worthy adversary is you, Doto, the surprise
villain! Take my hand and rise onto the stage!
Come, come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto starts vigorously pacing, eyes
darting every which way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what to do? She's inviting me... The Opera O is asking me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: She's my idol... But I'm... weak. Unghhh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to try, b-but... I just know... I'll never...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I-I just... can't!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto runs away at full speed. I guess that
push from Opera O is too much pressure for her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! Is this a rejection?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the heavens... I must have made her nervous
with this excessive appeal of mine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I will not stop now. Yes, what has just
transpired simply makes this a cliffhanger.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! Who is this great
adversary I speak of? They will be revealed...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At the Satsuki Sho! So, come, and we shall meet
again in the lush greens of Nakayama, where I will
cross my blade with theirs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's managed to spin a convincing tale.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you have to find me a rival before the
Satsuki Sho. They must be exceptional, mind you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And, of course, I bear the full brunt of it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Opera O... Her hand was right there, and I...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I'm sorry I'm... so weak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things get pretty out of hand with today's event,
but T.M. Opera O manages to gain more fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her path stretches forward now to the Satsuki
Sho.
